mapper.sql: a.id as id ,a.kecheng_id as kechengId ,a.chapter_id as chapterId ,a.jiaoshi_id as jiaoshiId ,a.exam_name as examName ,a.exam_summary as examSummary ,a.duration_minutes as durationMinutes ,a.total_score as totalScore ,a.pass_score as passScore ,a.start_time as startTime ,a.end_time as endTime ,a.exam_status as examStatus ,a.allow_retake as allowRetake ,a.max_attempt_count as maxAttemptCount ,a.allow_resume as allowResume ,a.publish_time as publishTime ,a.is_deleted as isDeleted ,a.create_time as createTime
